rationale.fidelity: Fully preserves routing and start-time decisions, capacity and time-window constraints, the operational five-minute budget, incumbent-at-cutoff mechanism, and routing-plus-lateness objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the operational deadline, search-order mechanism, reference-method counterfactual, trade-off, and evidence-conditioned decision value concrete without translating runtime into unsupported business effects.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not applicable: the prompt concerns operational and evidentiary framing, and the response makes no literature-relative contribution claim.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Clearly labels comparative superiority as unsupported, specifies a fair test design and uncertainty reporting, and bounds claims to minute-five incumbent quality rather than causal operational effects.
rationale.prose_clarity: The organization is strong, but widespread character-encoding corruption reduces professional readability.
rationale.overall: Substantively excellent and evidence-disciplined; the only material weakness is corrupted typography.
